task: Project Records Realignment to Current Mainline v1
current_mainline: offline PDF-corpus evidence-sufficiency screening framework: PDF corpus -> BM25 top-k retrieval -> evidence canonicalization (best_sentence_top5_overlap) -> CESE-OCN/R4 relation-specific screening (restored R4, 10 seeds, per-seed thresholds, majority vote) -> risk ranking (G_conservative_precision) -> second-stage human review queue
selected_method_description: BM25 top-k + best_sentence_top5_overlap canonicalization + restored R4 (10 seeds, per-seed thresholds) + G_conservative_precision ranking + second-stage review queue
deprecated_versions: V3.7 (historical advisor-handoff paper draft; not current selected method)
V3.15 hierarchical taxonomy revision (paper-level interpretation; not empirical mainline)
V3.16 no-gold evidence integration (historical revision plan; superseded)
mixed_framework_v2_frozen_r4_baseline (historical frozen R4 baseline using frozen reference thresholds; current mainline uses restored R4 per-seed thresholds)
paper_ready_mixed_framework_v2 (historical paper-ready pack; superseded by V3.17 baseline + V3.18 ablation)
overnight_non_api_compute_pipeline_v1 (historical diagnostic pipeline; supporting evidence only)
stale_claims_remaining_note: 0 high-risk stale claims remain in active project records. All 16 distinct should_edit=yes files were updated with realignment banners. The 158 should_edit=no rows (across 158 distinct files) are either already-aligned, historical, or read-only paper body, documented as historical in mainline_realignment_change_log.md.
allowed_claims_summary: Raw retrieved chunks degrade R4 screening
R4 is a second-stage screening router, not standalone
V3.17 baseline is the selected main method
SimClaim is a controlled silver diagnostic test set
R4 macro_F1 lower than LLM, but R4 captures Level-2 strong_action signal
V3.18 intelligent upgrade is an exploratory negative ablation
forbidden_claims_summary: BM25 raw chunks alone solve screening
The model fully understands scientific language
next_paper_revision_note: Project records are now aligned to V3.17 baseline as the selected main method, with V3.18 as exploratory negative ablation. The paper body itself was NOT modified in this task. The next paper revision should: (1) reframe the abstract and §I to position the contribution as offline PDF-corpus evidence-sufficiency screening with canonicalization as the bridge; (2) update §IV method to describe the V3.17 baseline pipeline; (3) add V3.18 as §VIII limitation / §IX future work negative ablation; (4) retain SimClaim as controlled silver diagnostic test set; (5) retain R4 as second-stage screening router (not standalone, not LLM-replacement).
